# Checklist: Requirements Quality
<!-- Generated by /speckit.checklist -->
<!-- Branch: main | Date: 2026-04-06 -->
<!-- Updated: 2026-04-06 — all items resolved -->

## Existing Requirements

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK001 | FR-001: debt.amount is i32, confirmed from code. Only transaction.timestamp changes to i64. | [consistency] | FR-001, CLR-001 | [x] |
| CHK002 | FR-002: Added concrete example — "100 cents split 3 ways = 34 + 33 + 33; debtor with fewest past overpayments gets extra cent" | [testability] | FR-002 | [x] |
| CHK003 | FR-004: Clarified exception — POST /group/{id}/member (join) is callable by non-members; returns 400 if already member | [completeness] | FR-004, US5 | [x] |
| CHK004 | FR-006: Verified — `validate_exp = false` in authentication.rs. CLR-002 confirms intentional. Spec and code agree. | [consistency] | FR-006, CLR-002 | [x] |
| CHK005 | FR-012: User is never both creditor AND debtor simultaneously in net calculation. Net = credits - debts per counterparty, producing a single signed integer. | [completeness] | FR-012 | [x] |
| CHK006 | FR-013: Added testable examples — "5"→"0.05" (5 cents), "500"→"5.00" (500 cents), "1234"→"12.34" (1234 cents) | [testability] | FR-013 | [x] |
| CHK007 | Added FR-028: Password min 8 chars enforced at frontend only (RegistrationPage:98). Backend has no length validation. | [completeness] | US1, FR-005, FR-028 | [x] |
| CHK008 | FR-004 updated: join endpoint returns 400 (BadRequest) if user is already a member. Service returns false on duplicate PK insert. | [completeness] | US5, FR-004 | [x] |
| CHK009 | Added FR-031: Creditor CAN be in debtor list (self-debt). No validation prevents this. Creditor is neither auto-included nor excluded. | [clarity] | US6, FR-002, FR-031 | [x] |
| CHK010 | Added FR-030: "New" badge when `updated_at === created_at`; "Active" otherwise. | [clarity] | US10, FR-015, FR-030 | [x] |

## New Features (from Clarifications)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK011 | Added US15 (Edit Transaction) and FR-025 to spec. | [completeness] | CLR-003, US15, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK012 | FR-025: Full replacement (PUT semantics). All fields required: amount, description, debtor_ids, optional timestamp. Creditor cannot change. | [completeness] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK013 | US15: "Operation wrapped in DB transaction for atomicity" — specified in US15 and FR-025. | [feasibility] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK014 | Added US16 (Delete Group) and FR-026 to spec. Owner-only, 404 for non-owner. | [completeness] | CLR-004, US16, FR-026 | [x] |
| CHK015 | FR-026 specifies frontend navigates to group list after deletion. Other users hitting deleted group will get 404 from API — existing frontend error handling navigates to `/` on data load failure. | [completeness] | CLR-004, FR-026 | [x] |
| CHK016 | Added US17 (Edit Profile) and FR-027 to spec. | [completeness] | CLR-005, US17, FR-027 | [x] |
| CHK017 | Added FR-029: Nicknames resolved at display time from user record. Changing nickname retroactively updates all displayed transactions. | [consistency] | CLR-005, FR-029 | [x] |
| CHK018 | T026 acceptance criteria: row counts must match between SQLite and PostgreSQL for all tables (user, group, group_member, transaction, debt). Verified via count queries post-migration. | [testability] | CLR-006 | [x] |
| CHK019 | T029 acceptance criteria: all existing transactions retain their timestamp values exactly after migration. Verified by comparing `SELECT id, timestamp FROM transaction` before and after. | [testability] | CLR-001, FR-024 | [x] |
| CHK020 | FR-026 specifies: confirmation dialog shows group name and number of transactions. | [clarity] | CLR-004, FR-026 | [x] |
